story.title: Terence Tao's ChatGPT conversation about the Jacobian Conjecture counterexample

draft:
I just read about Terence Tao's conversation with ChatGPT on the Jacobian Conjecture counterexample. 
Tao's discussion highlights the limitations of AI in math research. 
He used ChatGPT to verify a counterexample, showing AI's potential as a tool, but not a replacement for human insight.
What role do you think AI will play in advancing mathematical research?
#AIinMath #MathResearch #JacobianConjecture
